start: ^NPC: The building behind me is the University Sports Office, but the entirety of the College of Education is now located at the Casisang Annex Campus.
continue_1: ^NPC: Still, welcome to the College of Education.
continue_2: ^NPC: The College of Education provides courses for students’ specialized training and research in various sectors of the education system.
continue_3: ^NPC: We offer Bachelor of Elementary Education, Bachelor of Early Childhood Education, and Bachelor of Physical Education.
continue_4: ^NPC: We also offer Bachelor of Secondary Education, major in Mathematics, Filipino, English, Social Studies, and Science.
